drools.lsp.logLevel.description: Server-side log level (java.util.logging). Use FINE or FINER to surface diagnostics when debugging.

drools.lsp.lint.missingEnd.description: Severity for the missing 'end' keyword lint check.

drools.lsp.lint.missingSeparator.description: Severity for the missing constraint separator lint check (missing comma between constraints).

drools.lsp.lint.missingSemicolon.description: Severity for the missing semicolon in consequence lint check.

drools.lsp.lint.unbalancedParens.description: Severity for the unbalanced parentheses lint check.

drools.lsp.lint.mvelPropertyAccess.description: Severity for the MVEL property-access style hint (prefer 'name' over 'getName()' in LHS constraints).

drools.lsp.inlayHints.enabled.markdownDescription: Show inline type hints for DRL rule bindings (e.g. `$count : count()` → `: Long`). VSCode's global `#editor.inlayHints.enabled#` still governs whether inlay hints are displayed at all.

drools.lsp.maven.pomPath.markdownDescription: Maven POM(s) used for dependency classpath resolution — a single path or a list of paths, each absolute or workspace-relative. Each project's classpath is resolved and the results are merged. Leave empty to use `pom.xml` at the workspace root.

scripts.pretest: mvn -f src/testFixture/pom.xml -ntp compile && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.pack:dev: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true })" && vsce package --githubBranch main -o ./dist/
